scored_papers.title: Holographic Dark Energy with Hubble Radius as an Infrared Cutoff in Einstein-Cartan Gravity
scored_papers.abstract: Non-interacting HDE with Hubble radius IR cutoff in E-C gravity. Weyssenhoff spin fluid gives torsion scalar Phi ~ a^-3 without ad hoc ansatz, w crossing phantom divide.
scored_papers.reason: 🎯 Einstein-Cartan ど真ん中！🌌 Weyssenhoff spin fluid で torsion scalar の scaling を ad hoc なしで導出 🔥 DESI 整合も主張
scored_papers.summary: ✨ Hubble radius IR cutoff の HDE、 Φ ~ a^-3 を自然導出。 ω_X が phantom divide cross、 weak torsion |Φ/H|<1 で動的 DE 🎢

scored_papers.title: The Higgs-top-Z mass coincidence relation after NNLO matching
scored_papers.abstract: M_H^2 ~ M_Z M_t at pole gives rho = 1.00362 +/- 0.00261 (1.4 sigma). NNLO MS-bar matching at mu=M_t gives rho-hat = 0.96714 +/- 0.00361.
scored_papers.reason: 🤔 M_H² ≃ M_Z M_t 偶然関係を 2025 PDG + NNLO matching で再評価 ✨ pole 1.4σ で生存、 MS-bar では 〜10σ 非整合 🎯 MCPP 路線好み
scored_papers.summary: 📐 Pole-level: M_H = 125.426 ± 0.120 GeV 予言で 1.4σ 整合 ⚖️ MS-bar 境界条件 λ = g_Z y_t/(4√2) は M_t スケールで非整合 ⚠️

scored_papers.title: New mechanism for fermion localization in f(T,T_G)-brane
scored_papers.abstract: 5D braneworld with f(T,T_G) gravity. Non-minimal Dirac coupling to torsional invariants modifies KK localization, Gauss-Bonnet term reshapes effective potentials.
scored_papers.reason: 🧱 Teleparallel + brane + KK の三役満 🎰 Gauss-Bonnet 項が effective potential を modulate 🌀 余剰次元 × teleparallel の交差点
scored_papers.summary: 🌀 f(T,T_G)-brane で fermion localization、 KK の Schrödinger 方程式導出。 zero mode は片 chirality のみ局在、 resonant states 出現 🎼

scored_papers.title: Generalised Cartan Geometry
scored_papers.abstract: Cartan-geometric framework for generalised geometries governed by a differential graded Lie algebra. Tangent bundle extended with global duality + local gauge group.
scored_papers.reason: 📐 Cartan 幾何の generalised 版 (M-theory branes 上)、 vierbein/torsion 枠組みに親しんでる人には natural 拡張 🌐
scored_papers.summary: 🧩 dgLA ベースの Cartan geometry。 extended tangent bundle に大域 duality + 局所 gauge、 connection + torsion + curvature を系統的構成 ✏️

scored_papers.title: Pseudo-Nambu-Goldstone inflation with Z_N symmetric waterfall fields
scored_papers.abstract: PNGB inflaton + N waterfall scalars with Z_N symmetry. Quadratic divergences cancel by Z_N, logs absent for N>2. Higgs-portal reheating, multi-component DM.
scored_papers.reason: ⚡ PNGB inflaton + Z_N waterfall hybrid inflation 🌊 Z_N で quadratic cancel、 N>2 で log も消える 🧹 Higgs portal reheating 🎁
scored_papers.summary: 🌀 Z_2/Z_3/Z_4 で phase 構造解析、 Coleman-Weinberg で radiative stability。 reheating 温度 < waterfall mass で domain wall 回避 🛡️
